contents:
You are in the middle of a cave. Around you, stone walls make it impenetrable. To the west, you can see a beautiful blue sky. The cave is wet; water is running down the walls. It is dark and dreary, a complete contrast with the sky in the west.

Nearby, a small lake can be seen with crystal clear water. A strange glow in the water makes it appear like there is a light in there.

In the cave, a red leather book on an old rusty chain can be found.

There is also a red button. The red button looks strangely modern and very out of place next to the book and the chain. Who knows what might happen if you were to push the button...

fsvsv
title: The Cave
